debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
hm : 2 ≤ m
A : Finset ℤ
B : Fin m → Finset ℤ
hBA : ∀ (i : Fin m), B i ⊆ A
hB : ∀ (k : Fin m), ∑ i ∈ B k, i = ↑m ^ (↑k + 1)
⊢ ↑m / 2 ≤ ↑A.card

failed_attempts: sorry
native_decide

have hm' : 0 < m := by omega
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA : #A < m := by
    rw [div_lt_iff (by norm_num : (0:ℚ) < 2)] at h
    have : (#A : ℚ) * 2 < m := h
    have hAnat : #A * 2 < m := by
      have : (↑(#A * 2) : ℚ) < m := by simp; linarith
      exact_mod_cast this
    omega
  have : Fintype.card (Finset A) = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_finset A
  have hcard : 2 ^ #A < 2 ^ m := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by omega : 1 < 2) hA
  have : Fintype.card (Fin m → Finset A) = (2 ^ #A) ^ m := by simp [Fintype.card_fun, this]
  -- The map B i ↦ B i as a subset of A gives m subsets with distinct sums
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i) := by
    intro i j hij
    simp only [hB] at hij
    have : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := hij
    have hmi : 1 < (m : ℤ) := by omega
    have := Int.pow_right_injective hmi this
    omega
  have : m ≤ (Finset.univ.image (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i)).card := by
    rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj]
    simp
  have hsub : ∀ k, (Finset.univ.image (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i)) ⊆ 
      (A.powerset.image (fun S => ∑ i ∈ S, i)) := by
    intro k
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hx
    obtain ⟨k', hk'⟩ := hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_powerset]
    exact ⟨B k', hBA k', hk'⟩
  have hcard2 : (Finset.univ.image (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i)).card ≤ 
      (A.powerset.image (fun S => ∑ i ∈ S, i)).card := 
    Finset.card_le_card (hsub 0)
  have hpow : (A.powerset.image (fun S => ∑ i ∈ S, i)).card ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    calc (A.powerset.image (fun S => ∑ i ∈ S, i)).card 
        ≤ A.powerset.card := Finset.card_image_le
      _ = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_powerset A
  omega

have hinj : Function.Injective B := fun i j hij => Fin.ext <| Nat.succ_injective <|
    pow_left_injective (by omega : (1 : ℤ) < m) (by simp only [hB, hij])
  have hcard : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    simpa using Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn B (fun i _ => Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i))
      (fun i _ j _ => hinj.eq_iff.mp)
  have hA_pos : 1 ≤ #A := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have := hB 0; simp [Finset.subset_empty.mp (hBA 0 |>.trans (Finset.card_eq_zero.mp (by omega)))] at this; omega
  nlinarith [Nat.lt_pow_self (by omega : 1 < 2) #A, hcard, hA_pos]

have hm_pos : 0 < m := by omega
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA_bound : A.card < m / 2 + 1 := by
    have := Nat.lt_add_one_iff.mpr (Nat.floor_le_self (m / 2) 1)
    calc #A < ↑(Nat.floor ((m : ℚ) / 2)) + 1 := by
      rw [← @Nat.cast_lt ℚ]
      calc (↑#A : ℚ) < (m : ℚ) / 2 := h
        _ ≤ ↑(Nat.floor ((m : ℚ) / 2)) + 1 := by
          rw [Nat.floor_eq_iff (by positivity : (0 : ℚ) ≤ m / 2)]
          constructor <;> linarith [Nat.sub_one_lt_floor (m / 2 : ℚ)]
      _ = ↑(Nat.floor ((m : ℚ) / 2) + 1) := by simp
  have hcard : A.card ≤ m / 2 := by
    have : (A.card : ℚ) < m / 2 := h
    omega
  have num_subsets : (A.powerset.card : ℕ) = 2 ^ A.card := Finset.card_powerset A
  have : 2 ^ A.card < 2 ^ (m / 2 + 1) := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by omega : 1 < 2) (by omega)
  have : 2 ^ (m / 2 + 1) ≤ m := by
    interval_cases m <;> simp_all
    all_goals (norm_num at * <;> omega)
  have : ∃ i j : Fin m, i ≠ j ∧ B i = B j := by
    by_contra hall
    push_neg at hall
    have hinj : Function.Injective B := fun i j hij => by
      by_contra hne; exact hne (hall i j hne hij)
    have := Finset.card_le_card (s := Finset.univ.image B) (t := A.powerset) (by
      intro s hs
      simp only [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hs
      obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := hs
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i))
    simp only [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj, Finset.card_fin, num_subsets] at this
    omega
  obtain ⟨i, j, hij, hBij⟩ := this
  have hi := hB i
  have hj := hB j
  rw [hBij] at hi
  have : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = m ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := by rw [← hi, ← hj]
  have : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1 := by
    have := pow_eq_pow_iff_of_ne_zero (x := (m : ℤ)) (by omega : (m : ℤ) ≠ 0)
    simp only [this, abs_of_nonneg (by omega : (0 : ℤ) ≤ m)] at *
    rcases this with h | h
    · exact h
    · omega
  exact hij (Fin.ext (by omega))

    push_neg at h
    have hcard : #A < m := by omega
    have : Fintype.card (Fin m) = m := Fintype.card_fin m
    have hinj : ¬Function.Injective B := by

        Fintype.card_coe] at this
      have hle : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := this
      have : 2 ^ #A ≤ 2 ^ (m / 2) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (by omega)
      have hm2 : 2 ^ (m / 2) < m := by
        interval_cases m <;> norm_num
        all_goals omega
      omega

    obtain ⟨i, j, hij, hBij⟩ := hinj
    have hsi := hB i
    have hsj := hB j
    rw [hBij] at hsi
    have : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := by rw [hsi, hsj]
    have hpos : (0 : ℤ) < m ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) := by positivity
    have := pow_injective_of_not_isUnit (m := (m : ℤ)) (by simp; omega) ((i : ℕ) + 1) ((j : ℕ) + 1)
    simp only [this] at this
    have := this ⟨by omega, by omega⟩
    omega
  calc (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ #A := by
    rw [div_le_iff (by norm_num : (2 : ℚ) > 0)]
    simp only [Nat.cast_le]
    linarith
sorry

have hBinj : Function.Injective B := by
    intro i j hij
    have hi := hB i
    have hj := hB j
    rw [hij] at hi
    rw [hi] at hj
    have := pow_right_injective (n := (m : ℤ)) (by omega : 1 < m) hj.symm
    exact Fin.ext (Nat.succ_injective this)
  have hcard : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    calc m = Fintype.card (Fin m) := (Fintype.card_fin m).symm
      _ = #(Finset.univ.image B) := by rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hBinj, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin]
      _ ≤ #(A.powerset) := Finset.card_le_card (by simp [Finset.subset_iff, hBA])
      _ = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_powerset A
  have : (m : ℚ) ≤ 2 ^ #A := by exact_mod_cast hcard
  have hA_pos : 0 ≤ #A := Nat.zero_le _
  have : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ 2 ^ #A / 2 := by linarith
  calc (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ 2 ^ #A / 2 := this
    _ ≤ #A := by
      rw [div_le_iff (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2)]
      induction #A with
      | zero => simp at hcard; omega
      | succ n ih => simp [pow_succ]; nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2) n]

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA : #A < m / 2 := by exact_mod_cast h
  have : (2 : ℚ) * #A < m := by linarith
  have hcard : 2 * #A < m := by

  have hsub : ∀ i, B i ∈ A.powerset := fun i => Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i)
  -- We have m subsets, so by pigeonhole, two must be equal
  have hm_pos : 0 < m := by omega
  have : Fintype.card (Fin m) = m := Fintype.card_fin m
  have hcard_pow : #(A.powerset) = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_powerset A
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A → True := fun _ => trivial
  -- If 2^|A| < m, then two B_i must coincide
  by_cases hpow : 2 ^ #A < m
  · have : ∃ i j, i ≠ j ∧ B i = B j := by
      by_contra hall
      push_neg at hall
      have hinj : Function.Injective B := fun i j hij => by
        by_contra hne
        exact (hall i j hne) hij
      have : m ≤ #(A.powerset) := by
        calc m = Fintype.card (Fin m) := (Fintype.card_fin m).symm
          _ ≤ #(A.powerset) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective (fun i => ⟨B i, hsub i⟩)
              (fun i j h => hinj (Subtype.mk_eq_mk.mp h))
      rw [hcard_pow] at this
      omega
    obtain ⟨i, j, hij, hBij⟩ := this
    have h1 := hB i
    have h2 := hB j
    rw [hBij] at h1
    rw [h1] at h2
    have : (i : ℕ) = j := by
      have hm_pos' : (1 : ℤ) < m := by omega
      exact Nat.pow_right_injective hm_pos' (by omega : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1)
    exact hij (Fin.ext this)
  · push_neg at hpow
    have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := hpow
    have : m ≤ 2 ^ (#A) := this
    have hexp : #A ≥ 1 := by
      by_contra hA0
      push_neg at hA0
      simp only [Nat.lt_one_iff, Finset.card_eq_zero] at hA0
      have := hB ⟨0, hm_pos⟩
      simp only [Fin.val_zero, zero_add, pow_one] at this
      have hBsub := hBA ⟨0, hm_pos⟩
      rw [hA0] at hBsub
      simp only [Finset.subset_empty] at hBsub
      rw [hBsub] at this
      simp at this
      omega
    have : (2 : ℕ) ^ 1 ≤ 2 ^ #A := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) hexp
    have : 2 ≤ 2 ^ #A := by simpa using this
    have := Nat.lt_pow_self (by norm_num : 1 < 2) #A
    have hineq : 2 * #A < 2 ^ #A := by
      induction #A with
      | zero => simp at hexp
      | succ n ih =>
        cases n with
        | zero => simp; omega
        | succ k =>
          simp only [pow_succ]
          have ihk : 2 * (k + 1) < 2 ^ (k + 1) := ih (by omega)
          omega
    omega

have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := Fintype.card_le_of_injective (fun k => B k)
    (fun k₁ k₂ h => Fin.ext <| Nat.cast_injective <| pow_right_injective 
      (by omega : 1 < (m : ℤ)) (by simp only [hB, h]))

  have : m ≤ 2 ^ A.card := this
  have : 2 ^ A.card < 2 ^ (m / 2) := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by omega) (by omega)
  have hm2 : 2 ^ (m / 2) ≤ m := by

  have hA : #A < m / 2 := h
  have hAm : #A * 2 < m := by
    have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right hA (two_pos : (0 : ℚ) < 2)
    simp only [div_mul_cancel₀] at this
    exact_mod_cast this
  have hcard : (Finset.univ.sigma fun _ => A).card < m * m := by
    simp only [Finset.card_sigma, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, smul_eq_mul]
    omega

  -- For now, we use that the sums are distinct powers of m
  have hdist : Function.Injective (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i) := by
    intro k₁ k₂ heq
    simp only [hB] at heq
    have := pow_right_injective (n := (m : ℤ)) (by omega : 1 < m)
    exact Fin.ext (Nat.succ_injective (this heq))
  have hne : ∀ k, (B k).Nonempty := by
    intro k
    by_contra hemp
    push_neg at hemp
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hemp
    simp only [hemp, Finset.sum_empty] at hB
    have := hB k
    have hpos : (0 : ℤ) < m ^ ((k : ℕ) + 1) := pow_pos (by omega : (0 : ℤ) < m) _
    omega
  have hcardB : ∀ k, 1 ≤ #(B k) := fun k => Finset.Nonempty.card_pos (hne k)
  have htotal : m ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, #(B k) := by
    calc m = ∑ _ : Fin m, 1 := by simp
    _ ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, #(B k) := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun k _ => hcardB k)
  have hbound : ∑ k : Fin m, #(B k) ≤ #A * m := by
    calc ∑ k : Fin m, #(B k) = #(Finset.univ.sigma B) := by simp [Finset.card_sigma]
    _ ≤ #(Finset.univ.sigma fun _ => A) := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card
      exact Finset.sigma_mono (Finset.Subset.refl _) hBA
    _ = #A * m := by simp [Finset.card_sigma]
  have : m ≤ #A * m := le_trans htotal hbound

    have h1 : (1 : ℚ) ≤ #A := by exact_mod_cast hApos
    linarith

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA : #A < m := by

  have : Fintype.card (Finset A) = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_finset A
  have hcard : 2 ^ #A < 2 ^ m := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 < 2) hA
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    have : m ≤ 2 ^ (m - 1) := Nat.lt_two_pow_sub_one_of_lt hm |>.le
    calc m ≤ 2 ^ (m - 1) := this
      _ ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
        apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
        have h2 : #A * 2 < m := by
          have := h
          rw [Nat.cast_lt] at hA
          omega
        omega

    intro i j hij
    have : B i = B j := by
      ext x
      simp only [Finset.mem_subtype] at hij
      constructor <;> intro hx
      · have : x ∈ A := hBA i hx
        have hxs : ⟨x, this⟩ ∈ (B i).subtype (hBA i ·) := by simp [hx]
        rw [hij] at hxs
        simp at hxs
        exact hxs
      · have : x ∈ A := hBA j hx
        have hxs : ⟨x, this⟩ ∈ (B j).subtype (hBA j ·) := by simp [hx]
        rw [← hij] at hxs
        simp at hxs
        exact hxs
    have hs := hB i
    rw [this] at hs
    have hs' := hB j
    rw [hs'] at hs
    simp only [Int.natCast_pow] at hs
    have : (m : ℤ) ^ (↑i + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ (↑j + 1) := hs
    have hm' : 1 < m := by omega
    have := Int.pow_right_injective (by omega : 1 < (m : ℤ)) this
    omega
  exact Nat.not_lt.mpr (Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ hinj) (by simp [this, hcard]; omega)

have hm_pos : 0 < m := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num : 0 < 2) hm
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA_bound : #A < m / 2 := h
  have hcard : #A ≤ (m - 1) / 2 := by
    have : (↑(#A) : ℚ) < m / 2 := h
    omega_nat using this, hm
  -- The number of subsets of A is at most 2^|A|
  have hsubsets : (Finset.powerset A).card = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_powerset A
  -- We have m distinct sums (since m^(k+1) are distinct for k = 0, ..., m-1)
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun k => (m : ℤ) ^ ((k : ℕ) + 1)) := by
    intro i j hij
    simp only at hij
    have : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1 := by
      apply Nat.pow_right_injective (by omega : 2 ≤ m)
      exact_mod_cast hij
    omega
  have hdistinct : (Finset.univ.image (fun k : Fin m => (m : ℤ) ^ ((k : ℕ) + 1))).card = m := by
    rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj, Finset.card_fin]
  -- Each B k is a subset of A, so maps to powerset
  have hBinA : ∀ k, B k ∈ A.powerset := fun k => Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA k)
  -- Different k give different sums, hence we need at least m subsets with distinct sums
  have hB_inj : Function.Injective B := by
    intro i j hij
    have : ∑ x ∈ B i, x = ∑ x ∈ B j, x := by rw [hij]
    rw [hB i, hB j] at this
    exact hinj this
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    calc m = (Finset.univ.image B).card := by rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hB_inj, Finset.card_fin]
      _ ≤ A.powerset.card := Finset.card_le_card (by intro x hx; simp at hx; obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hx; exact hBinA k)
      _ = 2 ^ #A := hsubsets
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ ((m - 1) / 2) := Nat.le_trans this (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) hcard)
  interval_cases m <;> simp_all

    calc #A < m / 2 := by exact_mod_cast h
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ (m / 2) := Nat.le_of_lt_add_one (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt this (Nat.lt_add_one _))
  interval_cases m <;> simp_all

have hcard : m ≤ 2 ^ A.card := by
    have hinj : Function.Injective (fun k => (∑ i ∈ B k, i)) := by
      intro i j hij
      simp only [hB] at hij
      have : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1 := by
        have hm2 : (2 : ℤ) ≤ m := by omega
        exact Nat.pow_right_injective hm2 hij
      exact Fin.ext (by omega)
    have hle : Fintype.card (Fin m) ≤ Fintype.card (Finset A) := by
      refine Fintype.card_le_of_injective (fun k => ⟨B k, hBA k⟩) ?_
      intro i j hij
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hij
      have h1 := hB i
      have h2 := hB j
      rw [hij] at h1
      rw [h1] at h2
      have : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1 := Nat.pow_right_injective (by omega : 2 ≤ m) h2
      exact Fin.ext (by omega)
    simp only [Fintype.card_fin, Fintype.card_finset] at hle
    exact hle
  have : (m : ℚ) ≤ 2 ^ A.card := by exact_mod_cast hcard
  have hlog : Real.log m ≤ A.card * Real.log 2 := by
    rw [← Real.log_pow]
    exact Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by exact_mod_cast hcard)
  by_cases hA : A.card = 0
  · simp only [hA, Finset.card_eq_zero] at hcard ⊢
    omega
  · have : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ A.card := by
      have h2 : (2 : ℚ) ^ A.card ≥ m := by exact_mod_cast hcard
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((A.card : ℚ) - 1), sq_nonneg (A.card : ℚ)]
    linarith

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA : A.card < m := by
    rwa [div_lt_iff (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2), mul_comm, ← Nat.cast_ofNat,
      ← Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_lt] at h
  have : Fintype.card (Finset A) = 2 ^ A.card := Finset.card_finset A
  have hpow : 2 ^ A.card < 2 ^ m := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by norm_num) hA
  have : Fintype.card (Finset A) < 2 ^ m := by omega
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun k => (B k).subtype (· ∈ A)) := by
    intro i j hij
    have hsumi := hB i
    have hsumj := hB j
    have : B i = B j := by
      ext x
      constructor <;> intro hx
      · have : x ∈ A := hBA i hx
        have hx' : ⟨x, this⟩ ∈ (B i).subtype (· ∈ A) := by simp [Finset.mem_subtype, hx]
        rw [hij] at hx'
        simpa [Finset.mem_subtype] using hx'
      · have : x ∈ A := hBA j hx
        have hx' : ⟨x, this⟩ ∈ (B j).subtype (· ∈ A) := by simp [Finset.mem_subtype, hx]
        rw [← hij] at hx'
        simpa [Finset.mem_subtype] using hx'
    rw [this] at hsumi
    have heq : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := by rw [← hsumi, ← hsumj]
    have hpos : 0 < (m : ℤ) := by omega
    have := pow_left_injective hpos.le (by omega : 1 ≤ (i : ℕ) + 1) heq
    omega
  have hcard : m ≤ Fintype.card (Finset A) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ hinj
  omega

have hinj : Function.Injective B := fun i j hij => by
    have := congr_arg (fun S => ∑ x ∈ S, x) hij
    simp only [hB i, hB j] at this
    exact Fin.ext <| Nat.succ_injective <| Nat.pow_right_injective hm this
  have hcard : m ≤ (A.powerset).card := Fintype.card_le_of_injective 
    (fun k => ⟨B k, Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA k)⟩) (fun _ _ h => hinj (Subtype.ext_iff.mp h))
  simp only [Finset.card_powerset] at hcard
  have : (m : ℚ) ≤ 2 ^ #A := by exact_mod_cast hcard
  have hlog : Real.log m ≤ #A * Real.log 2 := by
    rw [← Real.log_pow]
    exact Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by exact_mod_cast hcard)
  nlinarith [Real.add_one_le_exp (Real.log 2 * #A), Real.log_two_gt_d9, sq_nonneg (#A : ℚ)]

have hm_pos : 0 < m := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num : 0 < 2) hm
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hA_lt : #A < m / 2 := by exact_mod_cast h
  have h2A_lt : 2 * #A < m := by linarith [hA_lt]
  have hcard : #A < m := by omega
  have : Fintype.card (Finset A) = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_finset A
  have hpow : 2 ^ #A < 2 ^ (m / 2 : ℕ) := by
    apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 < 2)
    exact_mod_cast hA_lt
  have hinj : Function.Injective B := by
    intro i j hij
    have hi := hB i
    have hj := hB j
    rw [hij] at hi
    have : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := by rw [hi, hj]
    have hm_pos' : (1 : ℤ) < m := by omega
    have := pow_left_injective hm_pos' this
    exact Fin.ext (Nat.succ_injective this)
  have : Fintype.card (Fin m) ≤ Fintype.card (Finset A) := by
    have : ∀ i, B i ∈ A.powerset := fun i => Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i)
    have hB' : ∀ i, (⟨B i, Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i)⟩ : Finset A) = 
               ⟨B i, Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i)⟩ := fun _ => rfl
    exact Fintype.card_le_of_injective 
      (fun i => ⟨(B i).subtype (· ∈ A), by simp [Finset.subtype]⟩) 
      (by intro i j hij; apply hinj; ext x; simp_all [Finset.ext_iff, Finset.mem_subtype])
  simp only [Fintype.card_fin, Finset.card_finset] at this
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := this
  have : 2 ^ #A < 2 ^ (m / 2 : ℕ) := hpow
  have h1 : (m / 2 : ℕ) < m := Nat.div_lt_self hm_pos (by norm_num)
  have h2 : 2 ^ (m / 2 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ (m - 1) := by
    apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
    omega
  have h3 : m ≤ 2 ^ (m / 2 : ℕ) := by
    calc m ≤ 2 ^ #A := ‹m ≤ 2 ^ #A›
    _ < 2 ^ (m / 2 : ℕ) := hpow
  omega

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hcard : #A < m := by
    rwa [div_lt_iff (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2), mul_comm, ← Nat.cast_ofNat,
      ← Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_lt, two_mul] at h
  have : Fintype.card (Fin m) ≤ Fintype.card (Finset A) := by
    have hB_inj : Function.Injective (fun i => ⟨B i, Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (hBA i)⟩ : Fin m → A.powerset) := by
      intro i j hij
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hij
      have hi := hB i; have hj := hB j; rw [hij] at hi
      have : (i : ℕ) + 1 = (j : ℕ) + 1 := by
        apply Nat.pow_right_injective (by omega : 2 ≤ m)
        exact_mod_cast hi.symm.trans hj
      exact Fin.ext (by omega)
    exact Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ hB_inj
  simp only [Fintype.card_fin, Fintype.card_coe, Finset.card_powerset] at this
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := this
  have : 2 * #A < m := by linarith [hcard]
  nlinarith [Nat.lt_two_pow_self #A]

have hm_pos : 0 < m := by omega
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hcard : A.card < m / 2 + 1 := by
    rw [div_add_one (two_ne_zero)] at h ⊢
    exact_mod_cast h
  have hcard' : 2 * A.card < m + 2 := by
    have : (A.card : ℚ) < (m + 2) / 2 := h
    have : 2 * (A.card : ℚ) < m + 2 := by linarith
    exact_mod_cast this
  have hcard'' : A.card ≤ m / 2 := by omega
  have hm2 : 2 * A.card ≤ m := by omega
  have hsubs : Fintype.card (Finset A) = 2 ^ A.card := Finset.card_finset A
  have hpow : (2 : ℕ) ^ A.card ≤ 2 ^ (m / 2) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) hcard''
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun i => (B i).sum id) := by
    intro i j hij
    simp only [id_eq] at hij
    have hi := hB i
    have hj := hB j
    rw [hij] at hi
    have : (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) := by rw [hi, hj]
    have hm_pos' : (1 : ℤ) < m := by omega
    have := pow_left_injective hm_pos' this
    omega
  have hcard_le : m ≤ 2 ^ A.card := by
    have := Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ hinj
    simp only [Fintype.card_fin] at this
    calc m ≤ Fintype.card (Finset A) := this
      _ = 2 ^ A.card := hsubs
  omega
exact le_of_lt (by simp_all; sorry)
sorry
native_decide

have h1 : (1 : ℚ) ≤ #A := by
    have : B 0 ≠ ∅ := by
      intro he
      simp only [he, Finset.sum_empty] at hB
      have := hB 0
      simp at this
      omega
    have : A.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_of_ne_empty (by
      intro he; apply this; ext x; simp [he, Finset.subset_empty.mp (he ▸ hBA 0)])
    simp only [Nat.one_le_cast]
    exact Finset.Nonempty.card_pos this
  have h2 : (2 : ℚ) ≤ m := by exact Nat.cast_le.mpr hm
  linarith [h1, h2]

simp only [ge_iff_le, le_div_iff' (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2), ← Nat.cast_ofNat]
  norm_cast
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hinj : Function.Injective B := by
    intro k j hkj
    have : ∑ i ∈ B k, i = ∑ i ∈ B j, i := by rw [hkj]
    rw [hB, hB] at this
    have hm_pos : 1 < (m : ℤ) := by omega
    have := pow_right_injective hm_pos this
    exact Fin.ext (by omega)
  have hcard : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := by
    calc m = Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin m)) := by simp
      _ = (Finset.image B Finset.univ).card := (Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj).symm
      _ ≤ A.powerset.card := Finset.card_le_card (by simp [Finset.subset_iff, Finset.mem_powerset, hBA])
      _ = 2 ^ #A := Finset.card_powerset A
  nlinarith [Nat.one_le_two_pow (n := #A)]

suffices h : m ≤ 2 * #A by
    rw [div_le_iff (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2)]
    simp only [Finset.card_def]
    exact_mod_cast h
  by_contra hlt
  push_neg at hlt
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun k => ∑ i ∈ B k, i) := fun k₁ k₂ heq => by
    simp only [hB] at heq
    exact Fin.ext <| Nat.succ_injective <| pow_right_injective hm heq
  have : m ≤ 2 ^ #A := (Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ hinj).trans_eq (Finset.card_finset A)
  have h1 : 1 ≤ #A := by
    by_contra h0
    push_neg at h0
    interval_cases #A
    simp at this
    omega
  nlinarith [Nat.lt_two_pow_self #A]
sorry
